problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
